title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same generate/chat/embed API surface as Python.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLMs, embeddings and tool-calling agents.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now named Open-WebUI); markdown, code highlighting, multi-user, RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async generate, chat, pull, list models with fluent builder API.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple generate/chat methods, model management, streaming support.

title: ollama-cli (go)
summary: Rich Go CLI wrapper around Ollama REST API with progress bars, templates, and interactive mode.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot chat requests to a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama; use local LLMs as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: FastAPI chatbot, Next.js chat, Slack bot, RAG with Chroma, function-calling examples.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support, PVC, and optional WebUI sidecar.

title: ollama-nuxt-chat
summary: Nuxt 3 full-stack chat app using server/api routes to proxy Ollama with SSR markdown rendering.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async/await bindings to Ollama REST API with serde types.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-to-run docker-compose stacks bundling Ollama, Open-WebUI, Chroma, Qdrant, Postgres for RAG.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Python Discord.py bot that chats with Ollama; supports slash commands, system prompts, per-user history.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for Ollama; generate and chat APIs, streaming via SSE, example Flutter chat app.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot 3 auto-configuration injecting Ollama Java client as @Bean for rapid prototyping.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM summarization, Q&A, and note rewriting via Ollama without cloud costs.

title: r/ollama - Local LLaMA 3 70B runs at 30 tokens/s on M2 Ultra
summary: Reddit discussion showing benchmarks and tips for maximizing throughput with Ollama on Apple Silicon.
